character.name: Fire Emblem GBA style chibi
character.prompt:
Fire Emblem GBA style chibi female mage cleric, western fantasy,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions,
large head with big expressive eyes, short body, small hands and feet,
wearing white and blue hooded robe with gold trim, hood pulled up over head,
hood completely covers top of head and hairline, no hair on top of head,
silver hair only visible as two locks framing the face at cheeks below the hood opening,
silver hair flowing down from below hood opening to chest level only,
no hair extending past hood, no hair on hood surface, no hair behind hood,
wooden staff with large blue crystal orb held in right hand,
young woman early 20s, gentle pose, eyes nose mouth visible inside hood,
clean pixel art, vibrant colors, sharp silhouette
